args.message: Hey there! You’ve got great taste. This 2017 Silverado 1500 LT is a real beauty, isn’t she? With the powerful 5.3L V8 and plenty of life left in her, this truck is ready to tackle any job or adventure you throw at it. Come on, let’s take a closer look!

args.message: Accidents? Not on this beauty! She’s been kept in immaculate condition, no accidents whatsoever. Clean history, clean title, ready to roll. You won't find a cleaner Silverado for this price, I guarantee it.

speaker: seller

args.message: This Silverado has been meticulously maintained. We have records showing regular oil changes and tune-ups. The previous owner was a real car enthusiast and took excellent care of it. I can pull up the full service records for you, but honestly, this truck runs like a top. Smooth, powerful, just pure American muscle.
